ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., fountain, projector) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the resource within the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of required maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., operational, maintenance needed, out of service) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the resource is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource being used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the usage event */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of usage in minutes */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of resource used (e.g., water consumption for fountains) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the usage */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumed during the usage session */,
  "water_consumption" REAL /* Water consumed during the usage session (if applicable) */,
  "sensor_data" TEXT /* Additional sensor data (e.g., temperature, humidity) collected during usage */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the usage session (e.g., issues encountered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the institution (e.g., staff, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level for the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource needing maintenance */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance request was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance required */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to handle the request */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Whether a follow-up is needed after maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitored resource */,
  "total_usage" REAL /* Total usage amount for a specified period */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average usage amount per session */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date for which the analytics data applies */,
  "total_energy_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption for the specified period */,
  "total_water_consumption" REAL /* Total water consumption for the specified period */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Number of maintenance requests for the period */,
  "downtime" REAL /* Total downtime in minutes for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., 3rd Floor West Hall) */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building name where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor number where the location is situated */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number (if applicable) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location (e.g., number of people) */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Whether the location is accessible to people with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
